question_text: What is a moment in physics?

options.label: A
options.text: A very short period of time

options.label: B
options.text: The turning effect of a force about a pivot

options.label: C
options.text: The total force acting on an object

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which something moves

explanation: A moment is the turning effect produced by a force. The further away from the pivot a force is applied, the greater the moment.
